WITN09400100
WITN09400100

did not have any personal interest in the case or view upon it. I therefore cannot
say if I was surprised by the outcome of the case. I attended as a witness, as I
had been asked to and given a statement, I was then asked to give evidence
about what I had experienced, as a Sub-postmistress during my time at Marina
Drive Post Office.

17. I cannot add anything further to the original statement I made on 19th October
2006 or the documents I have been provided with, as I have little recollection
due to the passage of time. My reflections upon the case and of my involvement
are therefore also limited.

STATEMENT OF TRUTH
I believe the content of this statement to be true.
SIGNED.. GRO
DATE.. 14/8/23
